summary: A party of seven players struggles against a difficult dungeon boss, the Dullahan, whom they initially mistake for a powerful raid boss. The protagonist, known as Alley Boss, intervenes and decides to solo the enemy, discovering it is actually a much weaker creature manipulated by a Lich named Cardum. After a chaotic fight involving tactical buffs and combat, Alley Boss defeats both the Lich and the Dullahan, earning significant experience and leveling up in the process.
key_moments: The party encounters the Dullahan, who turns out to be a weaker boss than the legendary raid version.
Alley Boss buffs himself and takes on the Dullahan and the Lich Cardum alone while his party watches.
Alley Boss defeats both enemies, levels up twice, and prepares to upload the footage for views.
